title: Follow safe work policies and procedures
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Follow safe work policies and procedures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to work safely

pcs.text: Identify the person designated with responsibility for health and safety in the workplace, their role and responsibilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the person designated with responsibility for health and safety in the workplace, their role and responsibilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the person designated with responsibility for health and safety in the workplace, their role and responsibilities.

pcs.text: Identify rights and responsibilities of self and others to ensure health and safety in the workplace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify rights and responsibilities of self and others to ensure health and safety in the workplace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify rights and responsibilities of self and others to ensure health and safety in the workplace.

pcs.text: Fit and correctly use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit and correctly use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and correctly use personal protective equipment.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret work safety signage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret work safety signage.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to work safely

elements.title: Conduct work safely

pcs.text: Identify and follow work procedures and workplace instructions to ensure safe work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow work procedures and workplace instructions to ensure safe work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow work procedures and workplace instructions to ensure safe work.

pcs.text: Apply safe handling practices when moving materials and items
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply safe handling practices when moving materials and items?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply safe handling practices when moving materials and items.

pcs.text: Maintain personal protective equipment for the work tasks carried out

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain personal protective equipment for the work tasks carried out.

pcs.text: Undertake housekeeping in work area following health and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake housekeeping in work area following health and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake housekeeping in work area following health and safety requirements.

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
